name: Aaronson Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt until well combined.
4. In another bowl, whisk together the sour cream, eggs, and melted butter until smooth.
5. Make a well in the dry mixture and pour in the wet ingredients. If using, stir in the green cheese and bacon until just combined.
6. Carefully spoon the batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling them about 3/4 full.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
8. Allow the muffins to cool in the tin for a few minutes before removing and serving. Enjoy!
